modules.name: Base64
modules.description: Launchpad Mini MkII connection hub. Attach page modules to the right.

modules.name: Buttons64
modules.description: 64 toggle or momentary buttons mapped to the Launchpad grid. 4 × 16-channel polyphonic gate outputs.

modules.name: Grid64
modules.description: 64 toggle or momentary buttons mapped to the Launchpad grid. 64 individual mono gate outputs.

modules.name: Sliders64
modules.description: 8 slewed CV sliders mapped to Launchpad columns. Scene buttons select slew rate. 8 mono CV outputs.

modules.name: Flin64
modules.description: Polyrhythm snake machine. 8 independent cyclic gate voices with variable speed and length. 8 mono + 1 poly gate outputs.

modules.name: Step64
modules.description: Classic 8-step sequencer. 7 gate rows with toggle steps, variable active length, flashing step indicator. 7 mono + 1 poly gate outputs, step CV.
